description_long: This is a medium-sized, irregularly shaped rock with a rugged, natural appearance. Its surface is coarse and uneven, featuring a mix of jagged edges, shallow crevices, and weathered textures. The coloration is predominantly earthy brown with patches of gray and subtle hints of lighter tan, suggesting exposure to the elements. The rock appears dense and solid, with no visible cavities or signs of artificial modification. Its form is asymmetrical, with one side broader and flatter, while the opposite end tapers to a more pointed edge. Such a rock could serve as a natural barrier or decorative element in an urban park or landscaped area.
description: A rugged, medium-sized brown and gray rock with a coarse, weathered surface and irregular, asymmetrical shape. It features jagged edges and natural textural variations.
description_view_0: This view shows the rock's broadest side, highlighting its jagged edges, layered textures, and a prominent overhang on the right.
description_view_1: From this angle, the rock appears more triangular and compact, with a pointed end and visible surface roughness.
description_view_2: This side reveals a flatter, more expansive surface with subtle color variations and less pronounced protrusions.
description_view_3: The rock looks narrower and more upright, emphasizing its vertical ridges and weathered, uneven surface.
attribute_location: urban park landscaping or roadside barrier
